tone.name: 暖色调

tone.name: 冷色调

tone.name: 高饱和
tone.prompt: vivid highly saturated color profiles, punchy vibrant palette, intense chromatic richness

tone.name: 低饱和

tone.name: 单色
tone.prompt: monochromatic single-tone palette grading, clean unified tonal gradation

lighting.name: 自然光
lighting.prompt: soft natural daylight temperature calibration, gentle ambient illumination

lighting.name: 霓虹光
lighting.prompt: vivid neon colorful light spill reflections neatly mapped onto skin and clothing borders

lighting.name: 戏剧光
lighting.prompt: high-definition directional key light styling to sculpt precise garment shapes

lighting.name: 月光
lighting.prompt: cool silver moonlight ambiance replication, soft lunar glow accenting edges

lighting.name: 电影光
lighting.prompt: cinematic three-point master studio lighting setup, professional film-grade illumination

texture.name: 磨砂质感

texture.name: 玻璃质感

texture.name: 金属质感

texture.name: 水墨晕染

texture.name: 油画厚涂
